name: Kitchen tap swap
customer_description: We swap your kitchen tap for a new one — isolated, fitted and leak-tested, with the old one taken away.
admin_description: Pick for a kitchen mixer/tap replacement. Customer or we-supply tap.

name: Bathroom tap swap
customer_description: We replace a basin or bath tap with a new one, fully fitted and tested for a clean, drip-free finish.
admin_description: Basin/bath tap swap. For both taps on a basin, set unit count or add a second line.

name: Dripping tap repair
customer_description: We stop the drip — new washer, cartridge or ceramic barrel — so your tap works like new.
admin_description: Repair (not replace) a leaking tap: cartridge/washer/barrel. Historical £72-85.

name: Outside tap fit
customer_description: We fit a new outdoor tap, neatly plumbed from your supply and ready for the hose.
admin_description: New external tap incl. short pipe run. Historical £117-205 for bigger runs.

name: Tap cartridge replacement
customer_description: We replace the worn cartridge inside your mixer tap to bring back smooth control and stop leaks.
admin_description: Ceramic cartridge swap on a mixer. Use when only the cartridge is the issue.

name: Toilet repair
customer_description: We fix a running, leaking or weak-flushing toilet — fill valve, flush mechanism or syphon sorted.
admin_description: Mechanism repairs: fill valve, flush, syphon. Not a pan swap (use TOI-SWAP).

name: Toilet replacement
customer_description: We remove your old toilet and fit a new one — connected, sealed and leak-tested.
admin_description: Full pan/cistern swap. Like-for-like. Historical £135.

name: Toilet seat fit
customer_description: We fit a new toilet seat securely, with no wobble.
admin_description: Toilet seat + bracket. Quick job. Historical £55-85.

name: Toilet unblocking
customer_description: We clear the blockage and get your toilet flushing freely again.
admin_description: Toilet blockage clear. Not for soil-stack/drainage faults.

name: Sink or shower drain unblock
customer_description: We clear a slow or blocked sink, basin or shower drain so water runs away properly.
admin_description: Trap/waste blockage on sink/basin/shower. Historical unblock shower drain £68.

name: Leak find & fix
customer_description: We track down where the water's coming from, fix it where we can, and tell you plainly what's next.
admin_description: Visible leak not tied to a specific fixture. Carry-over of LEAK-07.

name: Shower unit repair or swap
customer_description: We repair or replace your shower so it runs at a safe temperature with a strong, steady flow.
admin_description: Shower MECHANISM (mixer/electric unit), not the enclosure or tiling. Carry-over SHWR-04.

name: Bar mixer & riser fit
customer_description: We supply or fit a bar mixer shower with riser rail and head, leak-tested and ready to use.
admin_description: Bar mixer + riser + head. Historical £176-198.

name: Shower hose or head swap
customer_description: We replace a perished shower hose or worn head for a fresh, leak-free fit.
admin_description: Hose/head only. Historical £23-95 (often paired). Small job.

name: Radiator swap
customer_description: We remove your old radiator and fit a new one — drained down, refitted, bled and balanced.
admin_description: Like-for-like rad swap. Historical remove+refit rads £113. Carry-over RAD-06 split.

name: Heated towel rail fit
customer_description: We fit a heated towel rail, plumbed in and tested, for a warm bathroom finish.
admin_description: New/replacement towel rail. Historical £105.

name: Radiator bleed & balance
customer_description: We bleed your radiators and balance the system so every room heats evenly.
admin_description: Cold-at-top rads, uneven heating. Small visit. No historical exact match.

name: Stopcock or valve swap
customer_description: We replace a seized or leaking stopcock or isolation valve so you can shut water off with confidence.
admin_description: Stopcock/isolation valve. Historical remove+fit stopcock £117.

name: Water heater swap
customer_description: We replace an under-sink or point-of-use water heater, connected and tested.
admin_description: Point-of-use heater swap. Historical £185. Not full boiler (out of scope).

name: Washer/dishwasher plumb-in
customer_description: We plumb in your washing machine or dishwasher — water, waste and a leak check before we leave.
admin_description: Appliance plumb-in on existing supply. Drilling cupboard inlet £113 historical.

name: Re-seal a bath
customer_description: We strip the old sealant around your bath, treat the mould, and lay a fresh mould-resistant bead for a clean, watertight finish.
admin_description: Single bath perimeter re-seal. The single most repeated job. Historical £38-88.

name: Re-seal a shower
customer_description: We cut out the failed sealant in your shower, kill any mould, and re-seal to stop leaks and keep it looking fresh.
admin_description: Shower tray/screen re-seal. Historical £55-108.

name: Re-seal a sink or worktop
customer_description: We re-seal around your sink or where the worktop meets the tiles, for a tidy, water-tight join.
admin_description: Kitchen sink/worktop junction re-seal. Historical £38-72.

name: Re-seal a window
customer_description: We remove tired sealant around a window and re-seal it cleanly to keep draughts and damp out.
admin_description: Window perimeter re-seal/caulk. Historical £55-83.

name: Caulk gaps & trims
customer_description: We fill and smooth gaps around trims, skirting or splashbacks for a crisp, finished look.
admin_description: Decorator's caulk on gaps/trim edges. Historical caulk tile trim £98.

name: Hang pictures & frames
customer_description: We hang your pictures, frames or canvases level and secure, with the right fixings for your wall.
admin_description: Per item. Light frames/canvas/art. Heavy mirrors use HANG-MIR.

name: Hang a mirror
customer_description: We mount your mirror securely and perfectly level, with fixings suited to the weight and wall.
admin_description: Per mirror. Historical install wall mirror £55-72. Heavy (>20kg) flag.

name: Hang clocks, signs & hooks
customer_description: We fix clocks, signs, hooks or small wall items neatly and securely where you want them.
admin_description: Per small wall item. Historical hooks/clocks/signs £45-55. Min call-out applies.

name: Fill holes & cracks
customer_description: We fill holes and cracks, sand them back and leave the wall smooth and ready to paint.
admin_description: Filler work. Carry-over FILL-55. If paired with paint prefer touch-up.

name: Key safe fit
customer_description: We fit a secure key safe to your wall so trusted people can get in without a spare key floating about.
admin_description: Wall-mounted key safe. Historical install key safe + cut key £85.

name: Fit fly screens
customer_description: We fit insect screens to your windows so you can let air in and keep the bugs out.
admin_description: Per window. Historical fly screens 3 windows £105 (£35 each).

name: Fit door stops
customer_description: We fit door stops to protect your walls and handles from knocks.
admin_description: Per stop, min 4. Historical 12 doorstops £105.

name: Fit towel rail or holder
customer_description: We fix a towel rail, ring or holder firmly to the wall, no wobble.
admin_description: Non-heated towel holder/ring/rail. Historical £45.

name: Fit bathroom accessories
customer_description: We fit your bathroom accessories — soap dishes, toilet-roll holders, robe hooks — securely and level.
admin_description: Bundle of small bathroom fixtures. Use unit count for many.

name: Fit a baby gate
customer_description: We fit a stair or doorway safety gate securely so it's safe and easy to use.
admin_description: Per gate or refit. Historical refit 2 gates £72.

name: Fit or remove a cat flap
customer_description: We fit a cat flap into a door or panel — or remove an old one and make good — for a neat finish.
admin_description: Cat flap fit (incl. door adjust) or removal+make-good. Historical £45-95.

name: Handful of small jobs
customer_description: A visit to knock out a list of small odd jobs around the home in one go.
admin_description: Catch-all 'misc fixes' line. Historical 'misc fixes' appears often. Default 2h.

name: Hang floating shelves
customer_description: We mount floating shelves level and solid, with concealed fixings sized to the load and wall.
admin_description: Per floating shelf. Historical 6 oak floating £90, hang 2-3 £55-90. Carry-over SHELF-21 split.

name: Put up bracket shelves
customer_description: We fit your shelves on brackets — found studs, level, and screwed in solid.
admin_description: Per bracketed shelf. Historical install 3 shelves £65-78.

name: Fix a shelving unit to wall
customer_description: We assemble (if needed) and secure your shelving unit or bookcase to the wall so it's safe and stable.
admin_description: Bookcase/Billy-style unit fix-to-wall. Historical IKEA shelving unit £95.

name: TV wall mount (plasterboard)
customer_description: We mount your TV on a plasterboard wall — bracket fixed solid, cables tidied, and tested before we go.
admin_description: Up to 65". Plasterboard needs proper fixings. Carry-over TVMT-24 split.

name: TV wall mount (brick/solid)
customer_description: We mount your TV on a solid or brick wall, with cables run neatly and a tested, secure finish.
admin_description: Up to 65" on masonry. Historical solid-wall £91.

name: Conceal TV cables
customer_description: We hide your TV cables in trunking or behind the wall for a clean, clutter-free look.
admin_description: Add-on to a mount or standalone trunking. Historical trunking add £65.

name: Mount a soundbar
customer_description: We mount your soundbar neatly under the TV, level and cable-tidied.
admin_description: Soundbar bracket. Often paired with TV mount.

name: Smart doorbell fit
customer_description: We fit and set up your video doorbell so you can see who's at the door from your phone.
admin_description: Ring/Nest doorbell on existing chime or battery. Historical Ring on brick £75.

name: Security camera fit
customer_description: We mount and set up a wireless security camera, positioned for the view you want.
admin_description: Single wireless cam fit + app pairing. Per-camera; add lines for more.

name: Socket swap
customer_description: We replace a worn, loose or damaged socket with a fresh one — isolated, fitted and safety-tested.
admin_description: Per socket, like-for-like. Historical fix/replace socket £68-75. Carry-over SCKT-09 split.

name: Add a new socket
customer_description: We add a new socket where you need one, neatly run from an existing supply and fully tested.
admin_description: New spur/socket (single feed). Historical add socket £45-100; IP66 outdoor £45.

name: Light switch swap
customer_description: We swap your light switch — including dimmers — for a clean, safe, working fit.
admin_description: Per switch, like-for-like incl. dimmers. Historical £65-98. Carry-over SWCH-54.

name: Light fitting swap
customer_description: We replace a ceiling or wall light fitting on your existing wiring — mounted, wired and tested.
admin_description: Per fitting, existing supply, no new cable. Historical £45-145. Carry-over LIGHT-10 split.

name: Pendant light swap
customer_description: We swap a pendant or hanging light for a new one, level and tested.
admin_description: Per pendant. Historical pendant £45-125.

name: Downlight or spotlight swap
customer_description: We replace failed downlights or spotlights with fresh units for even, working lighting.
admin_description: Per downlight/spot, min 2. Historical replace downlight lamps £65 (batch).

name: Extractor fan fit
customer_description: We repair or replace a bathroom or kitchen extractor fan and check it's venting properly.
admin_description: Fan repair/swap incl. humidity-sensing. Historical £75-120. Carry-over FAN-12.

name: Fan pull-cord swap
customer_description: We replace a snapped or sticking extractor fan pull-cord switch.
admin_description: Pull-cord only. Historical £50.

name: Smoke or CO alarm fit
customer_description: We fit smoke or carbon-monoxide alarms in the right spots and test them so your home's protected.

name: Fused spur fit or repair
customer_description: We fit or repair a fused spur for appliances like cookers, heaters or boilers, safely tested.
admin_description: Switched fuse spur. Historical £68-75.

name: Outdoor floodlight fit
customer_description: We fit an outdoor floodlight or PIR security light, wired from a suitable supply and tested.
admin_description: External flood/PIR. Historical floodlight w/ supply £200; solar lights £50-65.

customer_description: We diagnose a non-working circuit, light or socket and tell you clearly what's needed to fix it.
admin_description: Fault diagnosis visit. Historical diagnose inline fan £75; inspect spur £75.

name: Fit a blind
customer_description: We fit your blinds — brackets up, hung, levelled and cords tidied for a neat finish.

name: Fit blinds in a bay
customer_description: We fit blinds across a bay window, each levelled and aligned for a clean, matching look.
admin_description: Per blind in a bay, min 3. Historical bay window blinds £105.

name: Fit a curtain pole or rail
customer_description: We put up your curtain pole or rail — marked, levelled and fixed solid to take the weight.
admin_description: Per window. Historical £45-95. Carry-over CURT-26.

customer_description: We fit a flexible PVC curtain track — ideal for bay or curved windows — for smooth, quiet draw.
admin_description: Bendable/PVC track. Historical £165-175.

customer_description: We re-fix a curtain rail that's pulled away, with proper fixings, then fill and make good the holes.

name: Repaint a room
customer_description: We repaint your room — walls prepped, filled where needed, and finished in two neat coats. Choose the size that fits.
admin_description: Small (box/single room), Medium (lounge/bedroom + ceiling), Large (open-plan/through-lounge). Carry-over RPNT-28.

customer_description: We prep and repaint a single wall in two coats for a fresh, even finish.
admin_description: One feature/marked wall. Historical £80-120.

name: Paint a ceiling
customer_description: We paint your ceiling in two coats of emulsion for a clean, bright finish.
admin_description: Single ceiling, 2 coats. Historical £104.

customer_description: We rub down and repaint your skirting, architraves and woodwork for a crisp, hard-wearing finish.
admin_description: Skirting/woodwork gloss/satin. Historical £68-273 by run. Default room-sized run.

name: Paint a door
customer_description: We prep and repaint a door — including the frame — for a smooth, even coat.
admin_description: Single internal door + frame. Historical repaint door £60-68.

name: Paint a front door
customer_description: We rub down and repaint your front door in an exterior finish for a fresh kerb-side look.
admin_description: External front door, weather-grade paint. Historical paint front door £80.

name: Repaint window sills
customer_description: We scrape, sand and repaint your window sills — treating any mould — for a clean, protected finish.
admin_description: Per sill/run. Historical £80-220 (multi-sill). Treat mould.

name: Stain-block & repaint
customer_description: We treat the stain or mark, seal it with stain-block primer, and repaint so it doesn't bleed back through.
admin_description: Water/damp/nicotine marks. Damp source must be fixed first. Carry-over STAIN-33.

name: Mould treat & repaint ceiling
customer_description: We kill the mould, seal the area and repaint your ceiling for a clean, fresh finish.
admin_description: Bathroom/kitchen ceiling mould. Damp cause must be resolved. Historical £80-111.

name: Touch-up & patch paint
customer_description: We sand, fill and blend small patches into your existing paint for a seamless touch-up.
admin_description: Small areas blended to existing. Carry-over TUCH-32 (repriced — £180 was wrong).

name: Paint exterior render or facade
customer_description: We prep and paint your rendered walls or facade in a weather-grade masonry finish.
admin_description: Masonry/render facade. Historical £280. Larger = site visit.

name: Strip wallpaper
customer_description: We score, steam and strip old wallpaper, then fill and sand so walls are ready to paint or paper. Choose by area.
admin_description: Small (1-2 walls), Medium (room), Large (multi-room). Historical £150-840. Carry-over WPSTR-34.

name: Hang wallpaper
customer_description: We hang your wallpaper with crisp, matched seams and a smooth, bubble-free finish.

name: Paint a fence or shed

admin_description: Fence/shed/timber. Historical paint fence £210-240. Tier later if needed.

name: Paint metalwork or pipework
customer_description: We prep and paint radiators, pipework, railings or garage doors in a hard-wearing finish.
admin_description: Metalwork/pipework/garage door. Historical pipework £104, garage door £108.

name: Wall panelling install
customer_description: We fit decorative wall panelling or beading for a smart, finished feature, ready to paint.
admin_description: MDF/V-groove/beading. Historical £288-700. Tier by wall area. Carry-over PNL-19.

name: Kitchen plinth fit
customer_description: We cut and fit kitchen plinths with neat corners for a tidy, finished base to your units.

name: Bath panel fit

name: Fit a rotary or washing line
customer_description: We fit a rotary dryer or washing line pole, set solid in concrete.
admin_description: Washing line pole + concrete base. Historical £90-135.

name: Fence panel install or repair
customer_description: We replace or repair fence panels — old ones out, posts checked, new panels fitted square and solid.
admin_description: Per panel. Historical fence panel £85-140 (with posts higher). Carry-over FNC-43 (repriced).

name: Replace a fence post
customer_description: We dig out and replace a rotten or broken fence post, set firm in concrete.
admin_description: Per post, concreted. Split from FNC-43. Often paired with panels.

name: Fit trellis or screening
customer_description: We fit trellis or garden screening to your fence or posts, secure and level.
admin_description: Trellis/screening. Historical cement pole for trellis £60.

name: Gutter clearing
customer_description: We clear leaves and debris from your gutters and flush the downpipes so rainwater drains freely.
admin_description: Clear up to 2-storey. Historical £79-88. Carry-over GUTT-46 split.

name: Gutter or downpipe repair
customer_description: We fix leaking joints, replace brackets or swap a damaged section so your guttering works again.
admin_description: Joint/bracket/section repair. Historical replace corner £70. Carry-over GUTT-46 split.

name: Jet-wash patio or driveway
customer_description: We jet-wash your patio, path or driveway — pre-treated and rinsed — to lift dirt, moss and grime. Choose by area.
admin_description: Tier by m². Historical £120-180. Carry-over PWSH-44.

name: Jet-wash a roof
customer_description: We clean moss and grime off your roof for a fresher look and clearer drainage.
admin_description: Roof soft/jet wash. Historical £180. Access dependent.

name: Jet-wash decking
customer_description: We jet-wash your decking to strip off algae and grime, ready to enjoy or re-oil.
admin_description: Decking clean. UK estimate.

name: Waste & rubbish removal
customer_description: We load, take away and dispose of your waste responsibly. Choose by how much there is.
admin_description: Small (¼ van), Medium (½ van), Large (full van). Historical £55-400. Carry-over WSTE-48.

name: Remove an appliance
customer_description: We disconnect, remove and dispose of a bulky appliance like a fridge, freezer or washer.
admin_description: Single appliance incl. fridge/freezer (WEEE). Historical fridge+freezer £120.

name: Remove old furniture
customer_description: We take away and dispose of unwanted furniture so your space is clear.
admin_description: Bulky furniture item(s). UK estimate; tier via WASTE-01 for volume.

name: Change a lock
customer_description: We change your lock — like-for-like or an anti-snap upgrade — and test it for smooth, secure operation.
admin_description: Single barrel/cylinder. Historical £95-150. Carry-over LOCK-17.

name: Fit multiple locks
customer_description: We fit or upgrade several locks across your doors for full, consistent security.
admin_description: 2+ locks in one visit. Historical 2 locks front door £150.

name: Fit a cabinet or coded lock
customer_description: We fit a cabinet, gate or keypad lock for controlled, keyless access.
admin_description: Cupboard/coded/keypad lock. Historical coded lock £98, cabinet lock £95.

name: Fix a faulty lock
customer_description: We free up a sticking, jammed or misaligned lock so it works smoothly again.
admin_description: Repair/adjust existing lock; stuck-key removal. Historical investigate+repair £45-53.

name: Shed assembly
customer_description: We build your shed from a flat-pack kit — levelled base, assembled and weather-checked.
admin_description: Pre-built shed kit. Historical £286-380 (6x4). Larger = site visit. Carry-over SHED-47.

name: Dismantle & remove a shed
customer_description: We dismantle your old shed and clear the waste, leaving the spot ready for what's next.
admin_description: Dismantle + dispose. Historical £150-169. Split from SHED-47.

name: Lay a shed or garden base
customer_description: We lay a level, solid base in slabs or concrete, ready for your shed, summerhouse or store.
admin_description: Concrete/slab base. Historical concrete shed base £280.

name: Decking install or repair
customer_description: We install or repair garden decking — boards cut, fixed and finished for a solid, even surface.
admin_description: Decking boards/repair. Historical £177-240. Larger = site visit. Carry-over DECK-58.

name: Paving, path or slab work
customer_description: We lay or repair paving, paths and slabs — prepped, levelled and finished. Choose by area.
admin_description: Small (single path), Medium (corner/area), Large (full drive). Historical £140-720. Carry-over PAVE-57.

name: Deep clean (single room)
customer_description: We deep-clean a single room or appliance to a sparkling, refreshed finish.
admin_description: Targeted clean (oven, bathroom, fridge, AC). Historical £35-135. Carry-over CLN-49.

name: Oven & hood deep clean
customer_description: We deep-clean your oven and extractor hood inside and out for a grease-free finish.
admin_description: Oven + hood. Historical deep clean oven+hood £80.

name: Air-con clean & filter check
customer_description: We clean your air-conditioning unit and check the filters so it runs clean and efficient.
admin_description: Split/wall AC clean + filter. Historical £50.

name: Site visit & assessment
customer_description: We visit, scope the work in person, and give you a clear written plan and quote.
admin_description: For complex jobs needing in-person scope before quoting. Carry-over VIS-52.

name: Repointing & brickwork
customer_description: We rake out and repoint loose or crumbling mortar joints for a tidy, weatherproof finish.
admin_description: Small repointing/brick repair. Historical pointing £88.

name: Minor roof repair
customer_description: We carry out small roof repairs — tiles, ventilation or sealing — to keep the weather out.
admin_description: Vent tiles, reseal, small repairs. Historical vent tiles £100, debris reseal £40. Access dependent.

name: External fixture fitting
customer_description: We fix outdoor fittings — signs, brackets, house numbers, hose reels — securely and weather-sealed.
admin_description: Small outdoor fixtures. Use a specific SKU if one fits. Carry-over EXTFX-59.
